items.title: EUR/USD Price Forecast: Ends week near 1.1400, down below the 200-DMA
items.summary: The Euro finalized the week posting losses of over 1.74% against the Greenback and 0.84% in the day. The EUR/USD posted four bearish days after falling below the 200-day Simple Moving Average (SMA) at 1.1672, turning the
items.title_ko: EUR/USD 가격 예측: 1.1400 근처에서 200-DMA 아래로 주 종료
